backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing access control and user profile storage with role checks for reading and writing profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping Hebrew content updates and RTL support requirements to the InfoPage source file.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each major frontend file and component.
frontend/ic-assets.json: Asset configuration enabling .well-known files with specific headers for deployment.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point loading the React app with favicon and root container.
frontend/src/.well-known/ic-domains: Duplicate domain verification file containing devee-music.com.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Client-side router component rendering LandingPage or InfoPage with fallback redirect.
frontend/src/components/AdminContentEdit: Empty placeholder file for the admin content editor component.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact form generating a mailto link and rendering fields plus a WhatsApp banner.
frontend/src/components/DirectLineBanner: Centered WhatsApp contact badge linking to a WhatsApp chat.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with tagline, SoundBetter badge, and copyright line linking to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: Responsive slide-in menu with escape handling, body scroll lock, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header displaying logo and toggling the hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section showing full-size profile image and animated scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Empty placeholder file for the admin profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/SectionSeparator: Pure black spacer component providing 120px vertical gap.
frontend/src/components/SocialSection.ts: Component returning null to disable social icons.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Renders a list of music video embeds with Spotify and Apple Music links using styled cards and dynamic YouTube embed URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder for backend-related React Query hooks; currently contains no logic aside from importing useActor.
frontend/src/ic-assets.json: Configures asset handling to include the .well-known directory.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining fonts, Tailwind layers, theme variables, RTL support, custom scrollbar, and base styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Empty placeholder file for an admin dashboard page.
frontend/src/pages/InfoPage.tsx: Displays an informational page with Hebrew content about the recording studio, wrapped with Header and Footer.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the main landing page using hero, video, contact, and layout components.
frontend/src/router.ts: Implements a minimal History API–based client router with navigation helpers and subscription support.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for parsing URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and handling hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with typography, container queries, custom colors, animations, and extended theme settings.
project_state.json: Defines project state for updating the Info page with expanded Hebrew RTL content and tracks related feature requirements.
